text: Prepare your installation company for the future. [Webinar](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/in-conversation/webinar/index.html). [Construction](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/bouw/index.html). 04/07/2025 • 2 minutes reading. [Leontien de Waal](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/authors/leontien-de-waal/index.html). The prospects for the installation sector are mixed and require strategic choices. During the recent Techniek Nederland webinar, the economic prospects for the installation sector from 2026 were discussed. Overall, the industry will grow slightly in the coming years, with a strong foundation in residential construction. Both new residential construction and sustainability offer good prospects for growth, while non-residential construction and infrastructure are developing more moderately. Important drivers for installers are the energy transition, the increasing installation rate in buildings and the role that ICT plays.

metadata.source_title: Prepare your installation company for the future

text: These developments are further explained in a recently published [report](https://www.technieknederland.nl/home/leadgen/download-economie-vooruitzichten-2026-en-verder/). Opportunities in a changing market. The prospects for the industry require adaptability from installation companies: investing in technological solutions, digitalization & cyber security and cooperation within the chain will become important conditions for remaining competitive and relevant. Innovative energy saving concepts, smart installations and maintenance solutions play a key role in this.

metadata.source_title: Prepare your installation company for the future

text: Entrepreneurs would do well to examine their strategy. Especially in a changing market, there are opportunities for companies that adapt in time. Installation materials vulnerable to price increases. Meanwhile, the sector is struggling with structural challenges such as labor shortages, an aging population and dependencies on international supplies. Consider, for example, installation materials such as heat pumps, inverters and electrical components that are imported. These supplies are vulnerable to disruptions in global trade and geopolitics, which could lead to shortages or price increases. Solutions in a tight labor market.

metadata.source_title: Prepare your installation company for the future

text: During the webinar, Leontien de Waal, Construction sector banker at ABN AMRO, discussed the implications of the developments for entrepreneurs. The structural challenge of staff shortages was also discussed.

metadata.source_title: Prepare your installation company for the future

text: Investing in attractive employment practices, training and responding to changing expectations of Gen Zers is important for future earning capacity.

metadata.source_title: Prepare your installation company for the future

text: In addition, the use of AI plays an important role in relieving the burden on employees. There are more and more useful AI tools on both the work preparation and execution side, allowing you to work faster and more efficiently.

metadata.source_title: Prepare your installation company for the future

In this publication we discuss the opportunities and challenges surrounding attracting and retaining Gen Zers in installation technology.
